raw: {"trigger_ref": "019db41a-6305-7001-8262-550fff458a17", "tenant_id": "019db41a-6305-7001-8262-550fff458a17", "claim_ops": [], "reasoning_trace": "The signal says a PR for the refund flow is up for review. However, the retrieved context contains no actor UUIDs, no entity UUIDs, no commitments, no resources — the actors_in_context explicitly states no internal actors are available. I cannot invent UUIDs. Without any scope_actors or scope_entities to bind a Model to, any claim I insert would be unscoped (both fields empty), which the instructions say is almost always wrong. The signal itself is a request for reviews, not a claim about a completed state — no PR merge, no ticket transition, just a PR opened. Without scoping UUIDs from context, I cannot responsibly emit a Model. I emit an empty diff."}
